basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 46 Assistant Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) has published the Assistant Professor Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 46 Assistant Professor positions. Candidates up to 50 years of age holding a medical qualification included in the First or Second Schedule or Part II of the Third Schedule of the IMC Act, 1956, a postgraduate qualification (MD/ MS or equivalent), and the prescribed teaching/ research experience are eligible to apply through Email on or before 16-07-2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules/orders.

qualification.education_qualification: Medical qualification included in I or II schedule or part II of third schedule to IMC Act 1956, Postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or equivalent, Three years teaching/research experience after MD/MS (or one year after DM/MCh as applicable)
qualification.details: Medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Postgraduate qualification e.g., MD/MS or equivalent. Three years of teaching/research experience after MD/MS (or one year after DM/MCh as applicable).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Medical qualification included in I or II schedule or part II of third schedule to IMC Act 1956, Postgraduate qualification e.g. MD/MS or equivalent, Three years teaching/research experience after MD/MS (or one year after DM/MCh as applicable)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical qualification included in the I or II schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Postgraduate qualification e.g., MD/MS or equivalent. Three years of teaching/research experience after MD/MS (or one year after DM/MCh as applicable).

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules/orders.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Assistant Professor posts at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Assistant Professor positions at AIIMS Bhopal is 16-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 46 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor positions at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a medical qualification recognized by the IMC Act, a postgraduate degree (MD/MS or equivalent), and three years of teaching/research experience after the postgraduate degree.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying for the Assistant Professor posts is 50 years, with age relaxation applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,42,506/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the AIIMS Bhopal Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted via email. Ensure you send your complete application with all required documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee of Rs. 2,000/- for General and OBC category candidates. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve Document Verification followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will be updated with the direct download link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment for these Assistant Professor positions is on a contractual basis.
